title: CORS State Machine & Preflights
description: Deconstruct the CORS state machine and the role of OPTIONS preflight requests. Optimize CORS performance using the Access-Control-Max-Age header. Design secure Cross-Origin Resource Sharing policies for web applications.
objectives: Deconstruct the CORS state machine and the role of OPTIONS preflight requests.
Optimize CORS performance using the Access-Control-Max-Age header.
Design secure Cross-Origin Resource Sharing policies for web applications.
